content: Get Pre Approved Personal Loans on YONO Online in India | SBI - Personal Banking Pre Approved Personal Loans on YONO Personal Banking Personal Finance Home Loan Personal Loans Show More Loans To Pensioners Auto Loans Education Loans Gold Loan Retail Loan Offers Loans Against Securities Loans Against Property Calculators IRAC norms SBI Surya Ghar – Loan for Solar Roof Top Pension loans Show Less Show More Pre Approved Personal Loans on YONO Features Eligibility How to Avail Apply Now Having an account with SBI is more rewarding now! You can avail Pre-approved Personal loans instantly at your convenience on 24*7 basis through YONO app or Internet Banking in just 4 clicks. Presently, this loan is being offered to a category of customers who are pre-selected on certain parameters pre-defined by us. Features Low Processing Fees Instant Loan Processing & Disbursement in just 4 clicks No physical documentation 24*7 availability through YONO & Internet Banking No branch visit Eligibility SMS “PAPL<space><last 4 digits of SBI Savings Bank Account No.>” to 567676 to check your eligibility Please note that PAPL is an offer to selected customers and not an actual sanction, which will be available only after fulfilment of terms & conditions applicable thereof. How to Avail Step 1: Login on YONO app or Internet Banking Step 2: Click on PAPL Banner Step 3: Enter PAN details & Date of Birth for validation Step 4: Select Loan Tenure & desired Loan Amount Step 5: Enter OTP -> Amount Credited Apply Now Last Updated On : Monday, 09-02-2026 Interest Rates Home Loan Personal Loan Pension Loan SB Account Gold Loan NRE SB Account Education Loan Auto Loan Fixed Deposit PM Surya Ghar Loan Against MF Agriculture Loans 7.25%* p.a. onwards w.e.f. 15.12.2025 *T&C Apply.
